nodes.label: Radevu Logo PNG
nodes.source_location: Square format logo on white background. Stylized falcon/eagle head bust in dark navy/indigo facing right, enclosed within an arched 'A'-like geometric frame topped by a small handle/loop (suggests a shopping bag silhouette). Below the mark: wordmark 'radevu' in lowercase rounded sans-serif; 'ra' in dark navy, 'devu' in violet/purple matching the brand indigo→violet gradient. Mark style: bold, geometric, monogram-style emblem combining a raptor symbol with an architectural arch.
nodes.author: founder
